Open image…⌘O

Add step…⌘N

Move step down⌘↓

✓Single file⌘1

Run
Run⌘R
Dry run (first file)⌘⇧R
Stop⌘.
Show live preview⌘P
Copy CLI command⌘⇧C
Open output folder⌘⇧F

Save preset…⌘S
Load preset…⌘L
